domain: Mapuche kultrun ceremonial drum (machi sacred drum; drumhead cross-quartered into 4 cosmic quadrants Meli Witran Mapu; tetrad of deities; machi trance + 4-direction cosmology)
specific_mechanism: Adversarial-attack-defense co-evolution stratified into 4 ATTACK-TYPE QUADRANTS by two orthogonal axes: axis-1 = direct-injection vs indirect-injection; axis-2 = persuasion-style vs decomposition-style. Each quadrant has its own attack generator G_q and defender D_q; defenders ONLY co-evolve against in-quadrant attackers. Inference-time meta-classifier C(x) routes incoming prompt to the in-quadrant defender D_q.
llm_application: KULTRUN-QUAD-DEFENSE: 4-quadrant stratified adversarial co-evolution defense. Attack-space partitioned by orthogonal axes — (A1) direct vs indirect injection, (A2) persuasion-based vs decomposition-based. Yields 4 quadrants Q1..Q4. For each quadrant, train (G_q, D_q) co-evolution pair using PPO with quadrant-restricted attack distribution. Inference: meta-classifier C(x) routes prompt x to quadrant-specific defender D_q(x). Differs from Attack-Defense Co-Evolution 2511.19218 (monolithic attacker-defender, no quadrant stratification), Baseline Defenses 2309.00614 (uniform defense bouquet without axis-stratification), Adversarial Preference Learning (monolithic preference attacker-defender), Attacks-Defenses Survey NAACL 2024 (taxonomy without explicit per-quadrant specialist training). Differs from R419 KOMI-WARD (defensive-prefix boundary, single defender), R424 TLINGIT-POTLATCH (second-price escalation scoring), R433 KATAJJAQ-BREAK (break-failure self-play duel).
novelty_claim: Attack-Defense Co-Evolution + Baseline Defenses + Adversarial Preference + NAACL Attacks-Defenses Survey cover co-evolution adversarial training. KULTRUN-QUAD-DEFENSE adds (a) explicit 2-axis attack-space partitioning + (b) per-quadrant specialist co-evolution pair + (c) meta-classifier routing. Recombination of MoE-style specialization + adversarial co-evolution.
